qa_pairs.response: Hey there! 👋 Welcome! I'm Areen's Portfolio Assistant. I'm here to chat about Areen's amazing work in AI & Data Science, incredible projects, journey through education, and much more. What would you like to know? I can tell you about skills, projects, education, experience, or anything else!

Great question! I'm Areen Mohammed Meraj Zaki, an AI & Data Scientist with a passion for building intelligent solutions that actually make a difference. I'm currently a PhD candidate in Computing at Asia Pacific University, focusing on Explainable AI for Healthcare. My work bridges the gap between powerful AI models and trustworthy, interpretable solutions. I love transforming complex data into actionable insights and creating AI systems that people can understand and rely on. Whether it's deep learning, NLP, computer vision, or healthcare AI – I'm all in! 🚀

Awesome! Here's what I bring to the table: Programming Languages like Python, SQL, and R, Deep Learning Frameworks including TensorFlow and PyTorch, Data Analytics Tools such as Power BI and Tableau, Web Development with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, Cloud Platforms like AWS and Google Colab, and Languages in both English and Arabic. Beyond the technical stuff, I'm strong in Problem Solving, Communication, Leadership, and Critical Thinking. I specialize in Machine Learning, NLP, Computer Vision, and building Real-time AI Interfaces with Gradio and Streamlit. Basically, I can help turn your data into intelligent solutions! 💡

Oh, I love talking about projects! 🎯 Let me highlight some of my favorites: Explainable AI for Skin Cancer Detection (My Thesis!) – Achieved 86.73% accuracy with Grad-CAM visualization for real explainability; Customer Churn Prediction – Built an LSTM model reaching 88.88% accuracy on banking data; Samsung Mobile Analytics – Created interactive Power BI dashboards with KPI tracking; NLP Projects including Cyberbullying Detection, Spelling Correction, and Sentiment Analysis; Brain Tumor Detection using image segmentation; Automated Attire Classification for retail automation; Plus several Real-Time AI Interfaces deployed with Gradio and Streamlit! Want to know more about any specific project?

My educational journey has been fantastic! Currently pursuing a PhD in Computing at Asia Pacific University (Expected 12/2028) where I'm researching Explainable AI for Healthcare. I completed my MSc in Artificial Intelligence from the same university (06/2024–10/2025) with a 3.77/4.0 GPA. Before that, I earned my Bachelor's in Computer Programming from Arab Open University (02/2021–04/2024, GPA: 3.35/4.0). I also hold a Certified Cybersecurity Engineer credential from Rocheston & Asia Pacific University. Throughout my studies, I've taken additional certifications in AI for Everyone, TensorFlow Development, and Microsoft Azure AI Fundamentals. Education is my passion! 📚

I'm a Fresh Graduate from my Master's in AI (10/2025) and now pursuing my PhD in Computing at Asia Pacific University! 🎓 During my studies, I built extensive hands-on experience with Building and Deploying ML/DL Models in production environments, Developing Explainable AI Solutions for healthcare and business, NLP Projects with real-world applications, Computer Vision Work for medical imaging and retail, Healthcare AI Applications focusing on diagnostic support, and Data Visualization & Analytics for business intelligence. I've worked on Cloud Deployment and real-time AI interfaces with Gradio and Streamlit, plus Team Leadership on research projects. Currently preparing PhD thesis manuscripts for top-tier journals (IEEE TMI, MICCAI, NeurIPS). My career trajectory is all about taking AI from research to real-world impact, ensuring models are not just accurate but also interpretable and trustworthy. I'm eager to continue contributing to innovative AI projects! What area interests you most?

Let's connect! 🤝 You can reach me at areenmeraj2003@gmail.com, call me at +965 55857335, or connect on LinkedIn at linkedin.com/in/areen-mohammed-meraj-17b696293. I'm based in Kuwait & Kuala Lumpur and always excited about collaboration, AI research projects, and innovative opportunities. Whether you want to discuss AI solutions, collaborate on a project, or just chat about data science – I'm all ears!

Excellent question! My PhD Thesis is titled 'Explainable AI for Binary Skin Cancer Detection Using Deep Learning and Machine Learning Models' and I'm currently working on it (Expected completion 12/2028) at Asia Pacific University. The project is groundbreaking because it combines 86.73% accuracy with real explainability through Grad-CAM visualization. I've built a Gradio-based GUI for real-time classification that doctors can actually use and understand. The cool part? I'm merging cutting-edge Deep Learning techniques with traditional Machine Learning to create trustworthy AI for healthcare. I'm preparing comprehensive manuscripts for top-tier journals like IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging, MICCAI, and NeurIPS. It's all about making AI transparent and reliable! 🔬

Wow, this is my favorite topic! 🤓 In Deep Learning, I work with CNNs, LSTMs, DNNs, MobileNetV2, and Transformers. For Machine Learning, I handle Classification, Regression, Clustering, and Time-Series Forecasting. My NLP Skills include Text Classification, Spelling Correction, Sentiment Analysis, and Named Entity Recognition. In Computer Vision, I do Image Classification, Object Detection, and Segmentation. I'm passionate about Explainable AI using techniques like Grad-CAM, LIME, and SHAP. I'm also great at Data Preprocessing, Feature Engineering, Model Evaluation, and Optimization. Basically, I can help you take your AI project from concept to deployment! Want to discuss a specific algorithm or technique?

Healthcare AI is my passion! 🏥 I've developed powerful Skin Cancer Detection Models achieving 86.73% accuracy with Grad-CAM visual explanations so doctors understand every decision. I've also built Brain Tumor Detection Systems using advanced Image Segmentation. What makes my healthcare AI special is the focus on Explainability, Trustworthiness, and Real-Time Performance. I create Real-Time AI Interfaces that medical professionals can actually use in practice. The goal? Support Early Diagnosis, improve Patient Outcomes, and ensure AI in healthcare is transparent and reliable. If you want to deploy AI in healthcare, I'm your person!

NLP is fascinating! 📝 I've built several cool projects: Cyberbullying Detection System using TF-IDF and multiple classifiers for real-time identification; Smart Spelling Correction with Bigram models and Edit distance algorithms; Sentiment Analysis Tools with Gradio GUI for interactive demos; Plus Named Entity Recognition and Text Summarization experiments. Each project is designed to be practical and deployable. I focus on combining Traditional NLP Techniques with Modern Deep Learning for the best results. Whether it's text classification, sentiment, or language understanding – I've got you covered! What NLP challenge are you facing?

Business intelligence is crucial! 📊 I created Interactive Power BI Dashboards for Samsung Mobile Analytics with live KPI Tracking, Trend Visualization, and Sales Insights. I also do Retail Analytics focusing on Customer Behavior and Purchase Pattern Analysis. My dashboards help businesses make Data-Driven Decisions quickly. I combine technical Data Analysis with Business Strategy to create solutions that actually drive results. From sales trends to customer insights – let me turn your data into actionable business intelligence!

Deploying AI is an art and science! 🎨 I specialize in Gradio and Streamlit for creating beautiful, User-Friendly AI Interfaces. I've deployed Skin Cancer Classifiers, Spelling Correction Tools, Cyberbullying Detection Systems, and Customer Churn Prediction Interfaces. The beauty of these tools is they let non-technical users interact with powerful AI models easily. I make sure every deployment is Fast, Intuitive, and Visually Appealing. Want to put your AI model in production with a slick interface? I can help!

Computer Vision opens amazing possibilities! 👁️ My projects include Automated Attire Classification using CNNs for retail automation, Skin Cancer Detection with medical image analysis, and Brain Tumor Detection using advanced Segmentation Techniques. I work with real-world datasets and focus on practical applications. Whether it's healthcare imaging, retail automation, or object detection – I can build solutions that see and understand images like humans do! Want to explore computer vision for your use case?

Great question! 🌍 I'm currently in Kuala Lumpur pursuing my PhD at Asia Pacific University, but my heart is also in Kuwait where I'm from. The global nature of my work means I collaborate with international teams all the time. I'm completely comfortable working across time zones and love the diversity of Global Collaborations. Whether you're reaching out from anywhere in the world, I'm open to Research Partnerships, AI Projects, and Innovative Opportunities!

I'm proud of my academic journey! 🎓 My MSc in AI earned me a 3.77/4.0 GPA – that's excellent! My Bachelor's Degree achieved 3.35/4.0 – very good! This consistent academic excellence reflects my dedication to mastering AI and Computing. I didn't just chase grades; I focused on deep understanding of concepts, practical implementation, and research contributions. My academic background ensures I bring both theoretical knowledge and practical expertise to every project!

I'm fortunate to be Fluent in Both English and Arabic! 🗣️ This bilingual ability is super valuable because I can collaborate seamlessly with diverse teams, communicate complex technical concepts in both languages, and engage with global stakeholders. Whether you prefer to communicate in English or Arabic, I'm ready! This skill opens doors for international collaborations and helps me connect with a broader audience in the AI and tech community.

I'm a Certified Cybersecurity Engineer from Rocheston & Asia Pacific University, which gives me a strong foundation in cybersecurity principles. I've also completed AI for Everyone by Andrew Ng, TensorFlow Developer Certificate, and Microsoft Azure AI Fundamentals. These certifications show my commitment to continuous learning and staying updated with the latest in AI and technology. They also enhance my ability to apply best practices in AI development and deployment!
